issues.detail: The skill does not explicitly handle missing or incomplete user context, which could lead to incomplete email drafts.

scenarios.name: Cold outreach to VP of Engineering about a dev tool
scenarios.rationale: Treatment kept the cold email under 125 words, used a specific subject line under 60 characters, single actionable CTA, and the skill's concise/compelling tone profile; baseline produced a long ~250-word email with multiple asks and a vague closer.

scenarios.name: Apology email to a client about a missed deadline
scenarios.rationale: Treatment applied the empathetic/accountable tone for apology emails, front-loaded the issue in 2 sentences, included a specific easy-to-answer CTA (e.g., a concrete time), and used the documented Subject/Greeting/Body/Closing structure; baseline buried the apology in hedging language and offered no concrete next step.
